---
title: "Who's Got the Birds? Edmonton's Ward Biodiversity Report"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

## Methods

```{r setup}
#| include: false

library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(wildrtrax)

load("coe-bats.RData")
wt_auth()
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

# Load data - taking bird project for now
coe <- wt_download_report(1750, 'ARU', 'main')

# Get recordings
coe_recs <- wt_get_sync("organization_recordings", organization = 5466) |>
  group_by(location) |>
  summarise(audio_hours = round(sum(recording_duration) / 3600,2)) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r data-prep}
#| include: false

# Neighbourhoods & ward polygons
neigh <- read_sf("./coe-nbh/coe-nbh.shp") |>
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

# Wards
wards <- neigh |>
  group_by(civic_ward) |>
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry), .groups = "drop")

# Point locations, neighbourhood/ward spatial join
coe_locs <- coe |>
  select(location, latitude, longitude) |>
  distinct() |>
  drop_na(latitude) |>
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

coe_locs_neigh <- st_join(coe_locs, neigh, join = st_within, left = FALSE)

# Species detections cleaned and joined to ward
coe_ward <- coe |>
  wt_tidy_species(remove = c("abiotic", "unknown", "insect")) |>
  filter(
    !grepl("Domestic", species_common_name),
    species_code != "NONE"
  ) |>
  left_join(
    st_drop_geometry(coe_locs_neigh) |> select(location, civic_ward),
    by = "location"
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(civic_ward))

# Per-ward summaries
ward_species <- coe_ward |>
  group_by(civic_ward, species_common_name) |>
  summarise(detections = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(civic_ward, desc(detections))

ward_richness <- ward_species |>
  group_by(civic_ward) |>
  summarise(richness = n_distinct(species_common_name), .groups = "drop")

ward_locations <- coe_ward |>
  group_by(civic_ward) |>
  summarise(n_locations = n_distinct(location), .groups = "drop")

ward_top5 <- ward_species |>
  group_by(civic_ward) |>
  slice_max(detections, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  summarise(
    top5_html = paste0(
      "<tr>",
      "<td style='padding:2px 6px'>", species_common_name, "</td>",
      "<td style='text-align:right;padding:2px 6px'>", detections, "</td>",
      "</tr>",
      collapse = ""
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ward_recs <- coe_recs |>
  left_join(coe_ward |> select(location, civic_ward) |> distinct(), by = "location") |>
  group_by(civic_ward) |>
  summarise(audio_hours = sum(audio_hours)) |>
  ungroup()

# Build popup HTML and attach to ward polygons
wards_map <- wards |>
  left_join(ward_richness,  by = "civic_ward") |>
  left_join(ward_locations, by = "civic_ward") |>
  left_join(ward_top5,      by = "civic_ward") |>
  left_join(ward_recs,      by = "civic_ward") |>
  mutate(
    popup_html = paste0(
      "<b style='font-size:13px'>", civic_ward, "</b><br>",
      "<span style='font-size:11px;color:#555'>Locations Surveyed: <b>", n_locations, "</b></span><br>",
      "<span style='font-size:11px;color:#555'>Species Richness: <b>",   richness,     "</b></span><br><br>",
      "<span style='font-size:11px;color:#555'>Audio Hours Collected: <b>",   audio_hours,      "</b></span><br><br>",
      "<span style='font-size:11px;color:#555'>Top 5 Species</span>",
      "<table style='font-size:12px;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:180px'>",
      "<tr>",
      "<th style='text-align:left;padding:2px 6px'>Species</th>",
      "<th style='text-align:right;padding:2px 6px'>Detections</th>",
      "</tr>",
      top5_html,
      "</table>"
    )
  )
```

```{r map}
#| include: true
#| echo: false

pal_ward <- colorFactor(palette = "Set3", domain = wards_map$civic_ward)

leaflet() |>
  addTiles() |>
  addPolygons(
    data             = wards_map,
    fillColor        = ~pal_ward(civic_ward),
    fillOpacity      = 0.5,
    color            = "white",
    weight           = 2,
    opacity          = 1,
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight       = 3,
      color        = "#e63946",
      fillOpacity  = 0.8,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    ),
    label  = ~civic_ward,
    popup  = ~popup_html
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal      = pal_ward,
    values   = ~civic_ward,
    data     = wards_map,
    position = "bottomright",
    title    = "Civic Ward"
  )
```
